panels.title: Lot별 수율 비교
panels.description: Lot마다 수율을 비교. 특정 Lot에서 급락하면 공정 이상 의심.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT l.LotNumber AS lot, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.Item = 'PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS yield FROM inspection_results r JOIN lot l ON r.LotId = l.Id GROUP BY r.LotId ORDER BY l.Id DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT l.LotNumber AS lot, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN r.Item = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass, SUM(CASE WHEN r.Item != 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail FROM inspection_results r JOIN lot l ON r.LotId = l.Id GROUP BY r.LotId ORDER BY l.Id DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT l.Id, l.LotNumber AS 'Lot 번호', l.Package AS Recipe, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', l.StartTime) AS '시작', strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', l.EndTime) AS '종료', ROUND((julianday(l.EndTime) - julianday(l.StartTime)) * 24, 2) AS '소요(h)', COUNT(r.Id) AS 전체건수, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.Item = 'PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(r.Id) * 100, 1) AS '수율(%)' FROM lot l LEFT JOIN inspection_results r ON r.LotId = l.Id GROUP BY l.Id ORDER BY l.Id DESC LIMIT 20
